achievements.name: Carlson's Raiders
achievements.description: Surprised the Japanese with a daring raid of the Makin Atoll.
achievements.lockedDescription: Complete 'Semper Fi' on any difficulty. (Solo only)

achievements.name: Stormed Peleliu
achievements.description: Took the fight directly to the Japanese on the island of Peleliu.
achievements.lockedDescription: Establish a beachhead on the island of Peleliu on any difficulty. (Solo only)

achievements.name: The Last Stand
achievements.description: Defeated the Japanese on their own soil in Okinawa.
achievements.lockedDescription: Survive the land and air conflict surrounding Okinawa on any difficulty. (Solo only)

achievements.name: Stabbed in the Heart
achievements.description: Took the fight deep into the Fatherland.
achievements.lockedDescription: Complete all missions on the Eastern Front on any difficulty setting. (Solo only)

achievements.name: Get Your Hands Dirty
achievements.description: Completed 'Semper Fi' on Veteran difficulty.
achievements.lockedDescription: Complete 'Semper Fi' on Veteran difficulty. (Solo only)

achievements.name: Saved Private Ryan
achievements.description: Saved a soldier from a terrible death.
achievements.lockedDescription: Save the soldier before he burns to death. (Solo or co-op)

achievements.name: Bloody Peleliu
achievements.description: Completed 'Little Resistance' on Veteran difficulty.
achievements.lockedDescription: Complete 'Little Resistance' on Veteran difficulty. (Solo only)

achievements.name: Weapon of Mass Destruction
achievements.description: You called in a naval bombardment that took out at least 4 Japanese soldiers.
achievements.lockedDescription: Radio in a naval bombardment that kills at least 4 Japanese soldiers. (Solo or co-op)

achievements.name: The Sword Is Broken
achievements.description: Completed 'Hard Landing' on Veteran difficulty.
achievements.lockedDescription: Complete 'Hard Landing' on Veteran difficulty. (Solo only)

achievements.name: No Safe Place
achievements.description: With the flamethrower, you've shown the enemy that no hiding place is safe.
achievements.lockedDescription: Burn an enemy out of a tree with the flamethrower in 'Hard Landing' (Solo or co-op)

achievements.name: Architect
achievements.description: Completed 'Vendetta' on Veteran difficulty.
achievements.lockedDescription: Complete 'Vendetta' on Veteran difficulty. (Solo only)

achievements.name: The Professional
achievements.description: Quickly dispatched all of Amsel's henchmen in 'Vendetta' without reloading.
achievements.lockedDescription: Shoot all of Amsel's henchmen, including their attack dog, without reloading. (Solo only)

achievements.name: Gunslinger
achievements.description: Assassinated General Amsel with a sidearm.
achievements.lockedDescription: Assassinate General Amsel with a pistol shot. (Solo only)

achievements.name: The Hammer Strikes
achievements.description: Completed 'Their Land, Their Blood' on Veteran difficulty.
achievements.lockedDescription: Complete 'Their Land, Their Blood' on Veteran difficulty. (Solo only)

achievements.name: Scorched Earth
achievements.description: Completed 'Burn`em Out' on Veteran difficulty.
achievements.lockedDescription: Complete 'Burn`em Out' on Veteran difficulty. (Solo only)

achievements.name: Firestarter
achievements.description: Made due with only the bare essentials: a regulation M2.
achievements.lockedDescription: Complete a mission using only the flamethrower. Melee, grenades & explosives are OK. (Solo or co-op)

achievements.name: Fearless
achievements.description: Completed 'Relentless' on Veteran difficulty.
achievements.lockedDescription: Complete 'Relentless' on Veteran difficulty. (Solo only)

achievements.name: Hell on Wheels
achievements.description: Completed 'Blood and Iron' on Veteran difficulty.
achievements.lockedDescription: Complete 'Blood and Iron' on Veteran difficulty. (Solo only)

achievements.name: Iron Fist
achievements.description: Destroyed all structures in your T-34.
achievements.lockedDescription: Destroy all towers and bunkers in 'Blood and Iron'. (Solo or co-op)

achievements.name: No Return
achievements.description: Completed 'Ring of Steel' on Veteran difficulty.
achievements.lockedDescription: Complete 'Ring of Steel' on Veteran difficulty. (Solo only)

achievements.name: Ruthless
achievements.description: Efficiently dispatched the enemy while mounted on a tank.
achievements.lockedDescription: Kill 15 enemies while mounted on a tank in 'Ring of Steel'. (Solo or co-op)

achievements.name: When It Rains, It Pours
achievements.description: Completed 'Eviction' on Veteran difficulty.
achievements.lockedDescription: Complete 'Eviction' on Veteran difficulty. (Solo only)

achievements.name: Shot in the Dark
achievements.description: Terrorized the enemy in the pitch dark of the Berlin underground.
achievements.lockedDescription: Kill 10 enemies while the lights are out in the subway in 'Eviction'. (Solo or co-op)

achievements.name: One Bad Gato
achievements.description: Completed 'Black Cats' on Veteran difficulty.
achievements.lockedDescription: Complete 'Black Cats' on Veteran difficulty. (Solo only)

achievements.name: The Sum of All Zeros
achievements.description: Established air superiority in a PBY Catalina "Black Cat".
achievements.lockedDescription: Down 45 Japanese Zeros in 'Black Cats'. (Solo only)

achievements.name: Lights Out!
achievements.description: You eliminated the enemy's ability to see your Black Cat.
achievements.lockedDescription: In 'Black Cats', blast out all of the spot lights in the Japanese cargo convoy. (Solo only)

achievements.name: Blowtorch & Corkscrew
achievements.description: Completed 'Blowtorch & Corkscrew' on Veteran difficulty.
achievements.lockedDescription: Complete 'Blowtorch & Corkscrew' on Veteran difficulty. (Solo only)

achievements.name: Setting of the Sun
achievements.description: Completed 'Breaking Point' on Veteran difficulty.
achievements.lockedDescription: Complete 'Breaking Point' on Veteran difficulty. (Solo only)

achievements.name: Mortar-dom
achievements.description: Your usage of improvised mortars devasted the enemy.
achievements.lockedDescription: Kill 8 Japanese with thrown mortars in 'Breaking Point'. (Solo or co-op)

achievements.name: Guardian Angel
achievements.description: You saved Sergeant Roebuck's life.
achievements.lockedDescription: In the final battle for Okinawa, save Sergeant Roebuck. (Solo or co-op)

achievements.name: For the Motherland
achievements.description: Completed 'Heart of  the Reich' on Veteran difficulty.
achievements.lockedDescription: Complete 'Heart of  the Reich' on Veteran difficulty. (Solo only)

achievements.name: Bearing the Burden
achievements.description: Completed 'Downfall' on Veteran difficulty.
achievements.lockedDescription: Complete 'Downfall' on Veteran difficulty. (Solo only)

achievements.name: Rough Economy
achievements.description: Demonstrated killer economic sensibilities by taking down 3 enemies with a single bullet.
achievements.lockedDescription: Kill 3 enemies with a single bullet. (Solo or co-op)

achievements.name: Close Shave
achievements.description: Encountered a Banzai attack and lived to tell the tale.
achievements.lockedDescription: Survive a Banzai attack. (Solo only)

achievements.name: Snake in the Grass
achievements.description: Took out a Japanese soldier camouflaged and hiding in the grass.
achievements.lockedDescription: Take out a Japanese soldier while he is lying in wait in the grass. (Solo or co-op)

achievements.name: Grave Robber
achievements.description: Successfully collected all Death Cards.
achievements.lockedDescription: Collect all Death Cards in the game. (Solo only)

achievements.name: Kamikaze
achievements.description: You were crazy enough to try it - completed a mission without firing a single shot.
achievements.lockedDescription: Complete any level on Regular difficulty or higher using only melee and grenades. (Solo only)

achievements.name: Throw a Six and a Half
achievements.description: You took it to the enemy and came out of the fray unscathed.
achievements.lockedDescription: On Hardened or Veteran difficulty, complete a level without dying. (Solo only)

achievements.name: Purple Heart
achievements.description: Awarded for demonstrating courage in the face of adversity.
achievements.lockedDescription: When staring into the face of adversity, show courage and persevere.

achievements.name: War Hero
achievements.description: Completed the game on any difficulty and won on all fronts.
achievements.lockedDescription: Complete the game on any difficulty. (Solo only)

achievements.name: Hardened War Hero
achievements.description: Completed the game on Hardened or Veteran difficulty and won on all fronts.
achievements.lockedDescription: Complete the game on Hardened or Veteran difficulty. (Solo only)

achievements.name: Get Your Left Foot Wet
achievements.description: Got online, met some people, and kicked butt in a Campaign Co-Op game session.
achievements.lockedDescription: Complete a match in Campaign Co-Op mode over Xbox LIVE. (Online co-op only)

achievements.name: Get Your Right Foot Wet
achievements.description: Got online, met some people, and kicked butt in a Competitive Co-Op game session.
achievements.lockedDescription: Complete a match in Competitive Co-Op mode over Xbox LIVE. (Online co-op only)

achievements.name: Blue Ribbon
achievements.description: Finished in 1st place in a Competitive Co-Op match.
achievements.lockedDescription: Complete a 4-player Competitive Co-Op match in 1st place over Xbox LIVE. (Online co-op only)

achievements.name: It’s All about Prestige
achievements.description: You achieved the first level of Prestige. Only 9 more to go.
achievements.lockedDescription: Take the leap - Prestige for the first time.  (Online multiplayer only)

achievements.name: Go Get Some Sun
achievements.description: You achieved the highest level in the game. Time to go outside and find some things to do...
achievements.lockedDescription: Achieve the highest level of Prestige.  (Multiplayer only)

achievements.name: Soul Survivor
achievements.description: You went the distance and proved your will to survive.
achievements.lockedDescription: Reach round 15 in Nazi Zombies without getting revived. (Map Pack 2 only)

achievements.name: Hammer Time
achievements.description: Congratulations. You may now add "General Contractor" to your resume.
achievements.lockedDescription: Repair 200 window boards in a single game. (Map Pack 2 only)

achievements.name: Weapon of Minor Destruction
achievements.description: You used a nuke to take out a single zombie. That's a little overkill, don't you think?
achievements.lockedDescription: Kill no more than one zombie with a nuke. (Map Pack 2 only)

achievements.name: Big Baller
achievements.description: You scored 75,000 points in a single Nazi Zombie game. You should consider going pro.
achievements.lockedDescription: Earn 75,000 points in a single Nazi Zombie game. (Map Pack 2 only)

achievements.name: Perk-a-Holic
achievements.description: Your cup overfloweth with Perks-a-Cola. What a lush!
achievements.lockedDescription: Have all four perks simultaneously active in a game of Nazi Zombies. (Map Pack 2 only)

achievements.name: Big Brawler
achievements.description: You are a bloodthirsty killer. You sure you don't have a little zombie in you?
achievements.lockedDescription: Get 10 consecutive zombie melee kills before Insta-Kill expires. (Map Pack 2 only)

achievements.name: Dead Air
achievements.description: Must have been a wrong number.
achievements.lockedDescription: Secret Achievement

achievements.name: It's a Trap!
achievements.description: Piles of zombie parts are the trappings of your success.
achievements.lockedDescription: Kill at least one zombie with three different traps in a single round. (Map Pack 2 only)

achievements.name: Fertilizer Man
achievements.description: You've seeded the ground for the Circle of Death.
achievements.lockedDescription: Kill 200 zombies in a single game. (Map Pack 2 only)

achievements.name: Deadhead
achievements.description: Congratulations. You may now add "Zombie Headhunter" to your resume.
achievements.lockedDescription: Get 150 zombie headshots in a single game. (Map Pack 2 only)

achievements.name: Locksmith!
achievements.description: Great! More places to run for your life!
achievements.lockedDescription: Open all doors in the map. (Map Pack 3 only)

achievements.name: The Might of the Monkey!
achievements.description: With zombies about to overwhelm you, it seemed like a good idea...
achievements.lockedDescription: Use the Monkey Bomb. (Map Pack 3 only)

achievements.name: Wacker Packer!
achievements.description: This is the start of something beautiful!
achievements.lockedDescription: Upgrade any weapon in Pack A Punch. (Map Pack 3 only)

achievements.name: Frequent Flyer!
achievements.description: We thank you for choosing us as your preferred method of escape!
achievements.lockedDescription: Use the teleporter 8 times. (Map Pack 3 only)

achievements.name: 40 Knives!
achievements.description: THIS is a Knife!
achievements.lockedDescription: Kill 40 zombies with the bowie knife. (Map Pack 3 only)

achievements.name: Der Electrician!
achievements.description: Excellent forward thinking, fellow Engineer!
achievements.lockedDescription: Link all teleport pads before round 7. (Map Pack 3 only)

achievements.name: Acquire Waffle Weapons!
achievements.description: International House of Awesome
achievements.lockedDescription: Obtain the Ray Gun, DG-2, and Monkey Bomb at the same time. (Map Pack 3 only)

achievements.name: Perkaholics Anonymous!
achievements.description: You stayed on the wagon until level 20! You have nerves of steel!
achievements.lockedDescription: Survive until round 20 without buying a single Perk. (Map Pack 3 only)

achievements.name: Pack Addict!
achievements.description: When enough is NEVER enough!
achievements.lockedDescription: Upgrade 5 weapons at the Pack a Punch Machine. (Map Pack 3 only)

achievements.name: Elevate Your Senses!
achievements.description: With regards from Group 935
achievements.lockedDescription: Activate the Fly Trap. (Map Pack 3 only)
